title: acritopappus harleyi
intro: Acritopappus harleyi, also known as the Harley's acritopappus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the southwestern regions of North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and promoting wound healing, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Acritopappus harleyi include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for medicinal purposes.
